name: sundry-expot-assets-manager
description: Simplify the management of your React Native Expo app's assets with ExpoAssetManager! This powerful and user-friendly VS Code extension allows you to seamlessly select, resize, and configure essential app icons and splash images, all while adhering to the recommended dimensions for Expo projects.

commands.title: Expo Asset Manager: Set OpenAI API Key
Expo Asset Manager: Clear OpenAI API Key

expoAssetManager.sourcePath.description: Optional folder containing original source assets.

expoAssetManager.openaiApiKey.markdownDescription: Optional OpenAI API key fallback. Prefer the `Expo Asset Manager: Set OpenAI API Key` command so the key is stored in VS Code SecretStorage.

expoAssetManager.aiModel.description: OpenAI image generation model used for AI asset generation.

expoAssetManager.aiOutputFormat.description: Output image format for AI-generated assets.

expoAssetManager.aiContextMode.description: Project context included in AI asset prompts.

expoAssetManager.statusMessageClearMs.description: Milliseconds before Expo Asset Manager clears generated status and error messages. Set to 0 to disable automatic clearing.

scripts.compile: yarn run check-types && yarn run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: yarn run check-types && yarn run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: yarn run compile-tests && yarn run compile && yarn run lint
